feat.name: Effortless Concentration
feat.special: This can only be used on a cantrip or spell from the class matching the one you gained this feat from.
feat.text: You can maintain a spell with hardly a thought. You immediately gain the effects of the Sustain action, allowing you to extend the duration of one of your active spells.
